Initializer# init(forGroupID:privilege:)

iOS 17.6+iPadOS 17.6+Mac Catalyst 17.6+macOS 14.6+tvOS 17.6+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 10.6+

```
init?(
    forGroupID groupID: NSNumber,
    privilege: MTRAccessControlEntryPrivilege
)
```
